About Us

Your trusted travel partner in the heart of Assam.

Jorhat Travels has been serving locals, tourists and businesses with reliable transport across Assam. Whether it's a Kaziranga safari, an airport transfer, or a long tour of the Northeast — we've got the vehicle, the driver, and the price to make it effortless.

  • ✓
    Wide fleet varietyCompact cars, sedans, Innova Crysta and minivans for every group size.
  • ✓
    Experienced driversProfessional, courteous drivers with deep knowledge of Assam's routes.
  • ✓
    Competitive ratesTransparent pricing with no hidden fees — quoted upfront.
  • ✓
    Clean & maintainedEvery vehicle is sanitised and serviced before your journey.
Northeast Tour Packages

Journeys across the Northeast.

Curated road trips from Assam to Meghalaya, Arunachal Pradesh and Sikkim with reliable cars, local routing and flexible pickup plans.

Meghalaya

Meghalaya Explorer

Discover Shillong's hill charm, Cherrapunji's living root bridges and the clear waters of Dawki in one scenic circuit.

Arunachal

Tawang Adventure

A memorable mountain drive through monasteries, valleys and high passes, planned for comfort across the long Himalayan route.

Plan a focused Kaziranga getaway with transfers, safari timing support and comfortable stays near the national park zones.
